title: Roadmap view-model (fold existing pure renderer)
description: Fold the existing pure RenderRoadmap/RenderRoadmapWithSelection (internal/tui/roadmap.go) into a Roadmap view-model (internal/tui/view_roadmap.go): wave-ordered epic list with selection cursor + jump-to-epic (port roadmapEpicOrder/syncRoadmapSelection/jumpToRoadmapEpic from model.go), walking the project hierarchy scope. Keep roadmap.go as the shared pure renderer (read-only, do not edit it). Register via ONE-LINE append in registerViews() (internal/tui/view.go). Files: internal/tui/view_roadmap.go (new) + test; one-line registerViews append.
acceptance_criteria: unit: selection moves wave-by-wave, Enter emits jump-to-epic that sets root scope/selection; teatest golden: Roadmap tab renders waves with selected epic highlighted; existing roadmap_test.go still green
